notes: This matrix maps every requirement ID to the minimum code and test evidence expected in the generated target repository.
The PDF contains business rules IK-01 through IK-17; IK-15 through IK-17 are included here even though earlier shorthand stopped at IK-14.
Slice values indicate the primary implementation slice that should land the requirement, not the only slice that may touch it.

requirements.summary: Email/password login
expected_code_evidence: API login endpoint with email/password validation and active-user checks
Web login page and form flow with Turkish error handling
expected_test_evidence: API integration test for valid and invalid login
Playwright login smoke for at least one role

requirements.summary: Issue JWT on successful login
expected_code_evidence: JWT generation service and signed token response payload
Client auth state that stores and forwards the token
expected_test_evidence: Auth test that asserts token issuance on successful login
Protected-route or protected-endpoint test using issued token

requirements.summary: JWT expires after 24 hours
expected_code_evidence: JWT config set to 24-hour expiry
Auth middleware that rejects expired or invalid tokens
expected_test_evidence: Token-expiry unit or integration test
Protected-endpoint denial test for expired token

requirements.summary: Exactly one role per user with role-based page blocking
expected_code_evidence: Single-role user model and RBAC middleware/route guards
Role-aware web routing for admin, resident, and security areas
expected_test_evidence: RBAC API denial tests across roles
UI route-guard tests or Playwright role-denial checks

requirements.summary: Store passwords with bcrypt
expected_code_evidence: Password hashing utility using bcrypt
User creation and reset flows that persist only password hashes
expected_test_evidence: Unit test that verifies bcrypt hash generation and comparison
Integration test that confirms plaintext passwords are not stored

requirements.summary: Forgot-password flow via email delivery
expected_code_evidence: Forgot-password request and reset endpoints with token lifecycle
Demo-safe email or outbox adapter for password reset delivery
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for forgot-password token generation and reset completion
Outbox or mock-delivery test that captures reset message

requirements.summary: Admin can activate or deactivate accounts
expected_code_evidence: Admin-only user-management endpoint or screen to toggle account state
Auth flow that blocks inactive users
expected_test_evidence: Admin management test for activation and deactivation
Login denial test for inactive accounts

requirements.summary: Auto-create monthly dues records per apartment
expected_code_evidence: Dues generation service or worker job tied to apartments
Schema and seed support for recurring monthly dues
expected_test_evidence: Worker or service test for monthly dues generation
Integration test that new monthly dues appear for apartments

requirements.summary: Resident can pay by bank transfer or credit card
expected_code_evidence: Payment endpoints and UI with selectable credit-card and bank-transfer methods
Demo-safe payment adapter that simulates approval results
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for both payment methods
Resident payment Playwright flow

requirements.summary: Store payment date, amount, and method
expected_code_evidence: Payment persistence model with timestamp, amount, and method fields
Receipt or history serialization that returns stored metadata
expected_test_evidence: Database integration test that asserts payment metadata persistence
History or receipt test that shows stored fields

requirements.summary: Send email and in-app notice for overdue dues
expected_code_evidence: Overdue reminder job and notification creation logic
Demo-safe email adapter plus resident notification feed wiring
expected_test_evidence: Job test for overdue reminder creation
Integration test that overdue dues create outbox and in-app notices

requirements.summary: Auto-calculate 2% monthly late fee
expected_code_evidence: Late-fee calculation logic applied to overdue dues
Stored balance or due-total model that includes late fee state
expected_test_evidence: Unit test for 2% late-fee calculation
Integration test that overdue due totals include late fee

requirements.summary: Admin can list payment status for all apartments
expected_code_evidence: Admin payment-status listing endpoint with apartment context
Admin web view for dues and payment states
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for admin payment-status listing
Admin UI test covering filter or table render

requirements.summary: Resident can filter own payment history
expected_code_evidence: Resident payment-history query with filtering options
Web payment-history screen with filter controls
expected_test_evidence: API test for resident-scoped payment-history filtering
Resident UI or Playwright test for filter behavior

requirements.summary: Resident creates maintenance request with category, description, and photo
expected_code_evidence: Maintenance create endpoint supporting category, description, and photo upload metadata
Resident maintenance-request form with category and attachment support
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for maintenance request creation with attachment
Resident UI or Playwright flow for opening a request

requirements.summary: Notify admin immediately on new maintenance request
expected_code_evidence: Immediate admin notification creation on request submit
Notification feed or outbox integration for maintenance events
expected_test_evidence: Integration test that new request creates admin notification
Notification feed test for admin visibility

requirements.summary: Admin updates maintenance status
expected_code_evidence: Admin maintenance status update endpoint limited to allowed states
Admin maintenance UI for status transitions
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for valid and invalid status transitions
Admin UI test for changing maintenance status

requirements.summary: Resident notified on maintenance status change
expected_code_evidence: Resident notification event emitted on maintenance status change

expected_test_evidence: Integration test for resident status-change notification

requirements.summary: Resident can rate completed request from 1 to 5 stars
expected_code_evidence: Rating field or relation limited to completed requests
Resident rating UI on completed maintenance items
expected_test_evidence: Integration test that only completed requests accept ratings

requirements.summary: Admin filters maintenance history by date and category
expected_code_evidence: Maintenance history query with date-range and category filters

expected_test_evidence: API test for maintenance filter combinations

requirements.summary: Admin publishes announcement with title and content
expected_code_evidence: Announcement create endpoint with title and content validation
Admin announcement compose screen
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for announcement creation
Admin UI or Playwright flow for publish action

requirements.summary: Published announcement notifies all residents
expected_code_evidence: Announcement publish hook that fans out resident notifications
Resident notification feed entry for announcement delivery

requirements.summary: Residents view historical announcements in date order
expected_code_evidence: Resident announcement listing sorted by publish date
Resident announcement page or feed view
expected_test_evidence: API test for resident announcement ordering
UI test for announcement history render order

requirements.summary: Admin edits or deletes announcements
expected_code_evidence: Admin edit and delete endpoints or commands for announcements
Admin announcement management UI
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for edit and delete behavior
Admin UI test for announcement management actions

requirements.summary: Support reservations for gym, meeting room, and child park
expected_code_evidence: Seeded common-area definitions for gym, meeting room, and child park
Reservation APIs and UI targeting supported common-area types
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for supported area reservation creation
Resident reservation UI flow across available area types

requirements.summary: Resident selects reservation time via calendar view
expected_code_evidence: Calendar or slot-based reservation UI
Backend slot query or availability computation for area schedules
expected_test_evidence: UI test for slot selection and submission
Playwright resident reservation journey using calendar flow

requirements.summary: Prevent overlapping reservations for same area and time
expected_code_evidence: Reservation conflict detection in service or database constraint layer
User-facing conflict error handling
expected_test_evidence: Integration test that overlapping reservation is rejected
UI test for visible conflict message

requirements.summary: Resident can cancel if at least 2 hours before event
expected_code_evidence: Cancellation policy logic enforcing 2-hour minimum window
Resident reservation management UI with cancel action state
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for allowed and blocked cancellation windows

requirements.summary: Admin can view and cancel reservations
expected_code_evidence: Admin reservation listing and cancellation endpoint
Admin reservation management screen
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for admin reservation cancellation
Admin UI test for reservation list and cancel action

requirements.summary: Resident can make at most one reservation per day per area
expected_code_evidence: Per-area per-day reservation limit validation
Resident-facing validation error messaging
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for same-day same-area reservation cap
UI test for blocked second reservation

requirements.summary: Admin can assign one or more parking spots to an apartment
expected_code_evidence: Parking assignment service and admin UI for apartment-to-spot allocation
Parking spot model linked to apartments
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for assigning multiple spots to an apartment within rules
Admin parking-management UI test

requirements.summary: Security registers visitor plate and visited apartment
expected_code_evidence: Security-only visitor vehicle create flow with plate and apartment selection
Visitor vehicle persistence with entry timestamp and security user
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for visitor vehicle registration
Security Playwright flow for vehicle entry

requirements.summary: Visitor vehicles have maximum 4-hour parking duration
expected_code_evidence: Visitor duration rule and deadline computation logic
UI or service state that shows elapsed/remaining visitor duration
expected_test_evidence: Unit or integration test for 4-hour visitor cap logic

requirements.summary: Automatic warning to security on visitor overstay
expected_code_evidence: Worker or scheduled alert path for visitor overstays

expected_test_evidence: Worker test for overstay alert generation
Integration test that overstay appears in security warning surface

requirements.summary: Admin can view live parking occupancy map
expected_code_evidence: Parking occupancy aggregation endpoint or query
Admin occupancy visualization or map/grid view
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for occupancy summary output
Admin UI test for occupancy map render

requirements.summary: Admin dashboard shows total collection, open requests, and occupancy rate
expected_code_evidence: Dashboard aggregation endpoint returning KPI values
Admin dashboard cards for collection, open requests, and occupancy
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for dashboard KPI aggregation
Admin dashboard UI test for KPI card display

requirements.summary: Export monthly dues collection report as PDF
expected_code_evidence: PDF report generation endpoint or service for monthly dues
Admin report export action in web UI
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for PDF report generation
UI or e2e test for report export action

requirements.summary: Show maintenance requests by category as pie chart
expected_code_evidence: Maintenance category aggregation query for reporting
Pie chart component on admin dashboard
expected_test_evidence: Aggregation test for maintenance categories

requirements.summary: Show 12-month dues payment trend as line chart
expected_code_evidence: 12-month payment-trend aggregation query
Line chart component on admin dashboard
expected_test_evidence: Aggregation test for 12-month trend output
Dashboard UI test for line chart render

requirements.summary: Admin can filter and view debtor apartment list
expected_code_evidence: Debtor-list query with admin filters
Admin debtor table with filter controls
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for debtor filtering
Admin UI or Playwright test for debtor list filters

requirements.summary: Page load time under 3 seconds
expected_code_evidence: Performance-minded production build, lazy loading, and efficient data-fetch strategy
Benchmark or smoke script documenting measured page-load threshold
expected_test_evidence: Performance check script asserting page-load target
Recorded benchmark output or automated perf test in repo

requirements.summary: Support 100 concurrent users
expected_code_evidence: Stateless API patterns and database access appropriate for concurrent load
Load-test or concurrency benchmark script in the repo
expected_test_evidence: Load-test output or script targeting 100 concurrent users
Documented benchmark evidence in final verification

requirements.summary: Database queries respond within 500 ms
expected_code_evidence: Indexed query paths and bounded reporting queries
Query timing or benchmark script for critical database paths
expected_test_evidence: Query benchmark output covering target endpoints
Performance script that fails when critical queries exceed threshold

requirements.summary: Use HTTPS for HTTP traffic
expected_code_evidence: Environment or reverse-proxy config that honors HTTPS mode and secure cookies
README or Docker instructions that include HTTPS-ready local or proxied deployment path
expected_test_evidence: Config verification test or smoke check for secure cookie / trusted proxy behavior
Final QA evidence that deployment path is HTTPS-ready

requirements.summary: Lock account for 15 minutes after 5 failed logins
expected_code_evidence: Failed-login tracking and lockout persistence
Auth service enforcement of 5 attempts and 15-minute lock duration
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for 5 failed attempts causing lockout
Time-window test for post-lockout recovery

requirements.summary: Validate against XSS and SQL injection
expected_code_evidence: Zod or equivalent request validation and sanitized render paths
Prisma parameterized access rather than raw string-built queries
expected_test_evidence: Validation tests rejecting malicious payloads
Security smoke script or integration tests for common injection attempts

requirements.summary: Passwords use bcrypt and minimum length 12
expected_code_evidence: Password policy requiring minimum 12 characters
Bcrypt hashing in create/reset/login-related flows
expected_test_evidence: Validation test rejecting short passwords
Hashing test confirming bcrypt-backed storage and verification

requirements.summary: Target 99.5% uptime excluding planned maintenance
expected_code_evidence: Health checks, restart-friendly services, and maintenance-mode handling
Operational guidance in README or handover for uptime and maintenance window
expected_test_evidence: Health-check smoke tests
Final QA evidence that services recover and expose health endpoints

requirements.summary: Responsive mobile and desktop UI
expected_code_evidence: Responsive layout implementation across core admin, resident, and security screens
CSS or component system with mobile and desktop states
expected_test_evidence: Responsive UI smoke checks
Playwright or component tests across mobile and desktop viewports

requirements.summary: New users can learn system within 30 minutes
expected_code_evidence: Clear navigation, labels, and self-explanatory workflows with Turkish copy
README or handover notes that include demo accounts and user flows
expected_test_evidence: Role-based e2e journeys covering common tasks without hidden manual steps
Final QA narrative or smoke evidence that main flows are discoverable

requirements.summary: Support sites up to 500 apartments without extra infrastructure
expected_code_evidence: Schema, pagination, and query patterns that scale to 500 apartments
Seed or benchmark path that can exercise larger apartment counts
expected_test_evidence: Benchmark or seed-based smoke check at larger apartment counts
Final QA evidence for acceptable behavior with expanded demo size

requirements.summary: Application is distributable as Docker containers
expected_code_evidence: Dockerfiles and Docker Compose for db, api, web, and worker
Documented local startup and shutdown commands
expected_test_evidence: Foundation gate using Docker Compose config and startup
Final end-to-end Docker boot verification

requirements.summary: Daily automatic backups with 30-day retention
expected_code_evidence: Backup job or script plus retention cleanup logic
README or handover instructions for running and verifying backups
expected_test_evidence: Backup verification script or test
Final QA evidence that daily backup and 30-day retention are represented

requirements.summary: Monthly dues due date is the 5th day of each month
expected_code_evidence: Dues generation logic setting default due date to day 5
Displayed due-date fields on admin or resident dues surfaces
expected_test_evidence: Unit or integration test for due-date generation on day 5
History or dashboard test exposing correct due date

requirements.summary: Apply 2% monthly late fee after 5 days overdue
expected_code_evidence: Grace-period calculation plus 2% fee logic
Stored overdue status that distinguishes fee-eligible dues
expected_test_evidence: Calculation test across grace period boundary
Integration test showing fee after overdue threshold

requirements.summary: Alert admin after 3 consecutive unpaid months
expected_code_evidence: Delinquency detection logic across consecutive months
Admin alert creation when threshold is reached
expected_test_evidence: Worker or service test for 3-month delinquency detection
Integration test for admin alert creation

requirements.summary: Only admin can change due amount, effective next month
expected_code_evidence: Admin-only due-amount update flow
Scheduling logic that applies changed amount starting next month
expected_test_evidence: RBAC test for due-amount change restriction
Integration test for deferred application in next billing cycle

requirements.summary: Resident can have at most 3 open maintenance requests
expected_code_evidence: Open-ticket count validation in maintenance create flow
Resident-facing error message when limit is exceeded
expected_test_evidence: Integration test blocking fourth open request
UI test for visible ticket-limit error

requirements.summary: Emergency categories require response within 2 hours
expected_code_evidence: Emergency category handling with response deadline tracking
Admin prioritization or alert logic for emergency tickets
expected_test_evidence: Deadline calculation test for emergency categories
Alert or escalation test for missed emergency window

requirements.summary: Escalate unanswered requests after 7 days
expected_code_evidence: Maintenance escalation job or scheduled check for 7-day threshold
Admin escalation notification output
expected_test_evidence: Worker test for 7-day escalation logic
Integration test for escalation notification creation

requirements.summary: Gym reservation lasts at most 2 hours
expected_code_evidence: Area-specific duration rule for gym reservations
UI validation communicating 2-hour gym limit
expected_test_evidence: Integration test rejecting gym reservations longer than 2 hours
Resident UI test for gym duration validation

requirements.summary: Meeting room cap is 4 hours per resident per day
expected_code_evidence: Per-day per-resident duration aggregation for meeting room
Validation messaging for exceeded daily limit
expected_test_evidence: Integration test for 4-hour daily cap across multiple meeting-room reservations
UI or e2e test showing blocked excess booking

requirements.summary: Residents with unpaid dues cannot reserve common areas
expected_code_evidence: Reservation eligibility check against unpaid-dues state
Resident-facing blocked-reservation message
expected_test_evidence: Integration test denying reservation for debtor resident
Resident UI or Playwright test covering unpaid-dues block

requirements.summary: No reservation between 23:00 and 07:00
expected_code_evidence: Time-window validation for disallowed late-night or early-morning bookings
Calendar UI that blocks or disables forbidden hours
expected_test_evidence: Integration test rejecting forbidden reservation times
UI test verifying blocked time slots

requirements.summary: At most 2 parking spots per apartment
expected_code_evidence: Parking assignment validation capping apartment spots at 2
Admin feedback for assignment-limit violations

Admin UI test for visible assignment-limit error

requirements.summary: Visitor vehicles stay on site at most 4 hours
expected_code_evidence: Visitor duration tracking and threshold comparison
Exit workflow or warning logic using 4-hour rule
expected_test_evidence: Integration or worker test for 4-hour visitor limit
Security journey test for warning or overdue state

requirements.summary: Accessible spots cannot be reassigned to other apartments
expected_code_evidence: Parking spot type model preserving handicapped designation
Assignment logic that blocks reassignment of accessible spots
expected_test_evidence: Integration test rejecting invalid accessible-spot assignment

requirements.summary: Maintenance mode allowed daily between 02:00 and 03:00
expected_code_evidence: Maintenance-mode config or guard that can enforce scheduled downtime window
Operational documentation describing planned maintenance handling
expected_test_evidence: Config or unit test for maintenance-window rule if automated

requirements.summary: Deleted user data retained for 6 months then fully removed
expected_code_evidence: Soft-delete or retention policy implementation for user data lifecycle
Operational cleanup path for delayed hard deletion
expected_test_evidence: Retention-policy test covering deleted-user lifecycle metadata

requirements.summary: Audit logs for login, payment, and request actions kept for at least 1 year
expected_code_evidence: Audit log model or append-only records for login, payment, and maintenance actions
Retention configuration or documentation for 1-year log storage
expected_test_evidence: Integration tests that create audit records for key actions
Final QA evidence that log-retention policy is documented and implemented
